title: Implement User Authentication
description: Set up JWT-based authentication with login, register, and password reset flows. Include refresh token rotation and secure cookie storage.

title: Build Dashboard Analytics
description: Develop the main dashboard with interactive charts, KPI cards, and real-time data visualization using Chart.js and custom widgets.

title: API Rate Limiting Setup
description: Configure rate limiting middleware for all API endpoints to prevent abuse. Implement sliding window algorithm with Redis backend.

title: Write Unit Tests
description: Achieve 80% code coverage with comprehensive unit tests for all service layers, utility functions, and API endpoints using Jest.

title: Mobile Responsive Optimization
description: Optimize all pages and components for mobile devices. Test across iOS Safari, Android Chrome, and various screen sizes from 320px to 768px.
